## Summary Report

### 1. All Files in src/ (Full Paths)

4. C:\Users\mail\AppData\Local\Temp\maestro-bench\t08-refactor-error-convention-on-r6-20260611-122820\src\format.js
5. C:\Users\mail\AppData\Local\Temp\maestro-bench\t08-refactor-error-convention-on-r6-20260611-122820\src\index.js
6. C:\Users\mail\AppData\Local\Temp\maestro-bench\t08-refactor-error-convention-on-r6-20260611-122820\src\money.js
7. C:\Users\mail\AppData\Local\Temp\maestro-bench\t08-refactor-error-convention-on-r6-20260611-122820\src\parse.js
8. C:\Users\mail\AppData\Local\Temp\maestro-bench\t08-refactor-error-convention-on-r6-20260611-122820\src\range.js
9. C:\Users\mail\AppData\Local\Temp\maestro-bench\t08-refactor-error-convention-on-r6-20260611-122820\src\store.js
10. C:\Users\mail\AppData\Local\Temp\maestro-bench\t08-refactor-error-convention-on-r6-20260611-122820\src\validate.js

### 2. All `throw new Error(` Lines with Line Numbers and Full Content

| File | Line | Content |
|------|------|---------|
| auth.js | 5 | `throw new Error('BAD_TOKEN: token malformed');` |
| calc.js | 5 | `throw new Error('DIV_ZERO: division by zero');` |
| dates.js | 5 | `throw new Error('BAD_DATE: not an ISO date');` |
| format.js | 5 | `throw new Error('BAD_WIDTH: width must be positive');` |
| money.js | 5 | `throw new Error('NEG_AMOUNT: amount below zero');` |
| parse.js | 5 | `throw new Error('BAD_INT: not an integer');` |
| range.js | 5 | `throw new Error('BAD_RANGE: min above max');` |
| store.js | 11 | `throw new Error('MISSING_KEY: no such key');` |
| validate.js | 6 | `throw new Error('EMPTY_NAME: name required');` |

**Total throw sites: 9 across all source files**

### 3. Full Content of src/index.js (Barrel File)

```javascript
'use strict';

module.exports = {
  ...require('./validate.js'),
  ...require('./parse.js'),
  ...require('./money.js'),
  ...require('./range.js'),
  ...require('./store.js'),
  ...require('./auth.js'),
  ...require('./format.js'),
  ...require('./calc.js'),
  ...require('./dates.js'),
};
```

### 4. Error-Related Files

No separate error-related files exist in the codebase. All error handling is embedded directly in each functional module using the consistent `throw new Error('CODE: message')` convention.

### Key Observations

- **Error Convention Pattern**: All errors follow a consistent pattern: `CODE_NAME: human-readable message`
- **Error Codes Found**: DIV_ZERO, BAD_TOKEN, BAD_DATE, BAD_WIDTH, NEG_AMOUNT, BAD_INT, BAD_RANGE, MISSING_KEY, EMPTY_NAME
- **Location Consistency**: All throw statements appear at line 5-6, typically as the first validation check in each module's main function
- **No Custom Error Classes**: All use standard `Error()` constructor with message prefixes for error identification

content.text:
VERIFIED. All 11 files updated and confirmed working:

- **`src/errors.js`** — new file exporting `class AppError extends Error` with `.name`, `.code`, and `.message` set correctly
- **9 modules** (`auth`, `calc`, `dates`, `format`, `money`, `parse`, `range`, `store`, `validate`) — each `throw new Error('CODE: text')` replaced with `throw new AppError('CODE', 'text')` plus the matching `require('./errors.js')` import
- **`src/index.js`** — `AppError` re-exported via `...require('./errors.js')` at the top of the spread
- No `new Error(` remains anywhere in `src/` outside `errors.js`; all success-path behavior unchanged

result:
VERIFIED. All 11 files updated and confirmed working:

- **`src/errors.js`** — new file exporting `class AppError extends Error` with `.name`, `.code`, and `.message` set correctly
- **9 modules** (`auth`, `calc`, `dates`, `format`, `money`, `parse`, `range`, `store`, `validate`) — each `throw new Error('CODE: text')` replaced with `throw new AppError('CODE', 'text')` plus the matching `require('./errors.js')` import
- **`src/index.js`** — `AppError` re-exported via `...require('./errors.js')` at the top of the spread
- No `new Error(` remains anywhere in `src/` outside `errors.js`; all success-path behavior unchanged
